D

DATE_FORMAT - Static variable in class calendar.controller.util.DateTimeParser
Standard ISO 8601 date format.
DATE_TIME_FORMAT - Static variable in class calendar.controller.util.DateTimeParser
Standard ISO 8601 date-time format.
dateTime(LocalDateTime) - Method in class calendar.controller.parser.EditEventParams.Builder
Sets the date-time of the event to edit.
DateTimeParser - Class in calendar.controller.util
Utility class for parsing date and time strings.
DAY - calendar.view.gui.SwingCalendarView.ViewMode
 
DAY_SELECTED - calendar.controller.gui.PropertyType
 
DayView - Class in calendar.view
Formatter for displaying events in a single-day view.

description(String) - Method in class calendar.model.CalendarEvent.Builder
Sets the event description.

Displays an error message to the user.
displayError(String) - Method in class calendar.view.ConsoleView
 
displayError(String) - Method in class calendar.view.gui.SwingCalendarView
 
displayEvents(List<CalendarEvent>) - Method in interface calendar.view.CalendarView
Displays a list of events in a formatted manner.
displayEvents(List<CalendarEvent>) - Method in class calendar.view.ConsoleView
 
displayEvents(List<CalendarEvent>) - Method in class calendar.view.gui.SwingCalendarView
 
displayMessage(String) - Method in interface calendar.view.CalendarView
Displays a general message to the user.
displayMessage(String) - Method in class calendar.view.ConsoleView
 
displayMessage(String) - Method in class calendar.view.gui.SwingCalendarView
 
DuplicateCalendarException - Exception in calendar.exceptions
Thrown when attempting to create or rename a calendar to an existing name.
DuplicateCalendarException(String) - Constructor for exception calendar.exceptions.DuplicateCalendarException
Constructs the exception with message.
DuplicateEventException - Exception in calendar.exceptions
Exception thrown when attempting to add a duplicate event to the calendar.
DuplicateEventException(String) - Constructor for exception calendar.exceptions.DuplicateEventException
Creates a new DuplicateEventException with the specified message.
DuplicateEventException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception calendar.exceptions.DuplicateEventException
Creates a new DuplicateEventException with the specified message and cause.
